## Verification

## Design System / Figma Sync

Complete this section whenever shared UI, DS tokens, or reusable Figma surfaces changed.

- [ ] `npm run figma-map:check`
- [ ] `npm run tokens:audit`
- [ ] `figma-component-map.md` updated if any reusable Figma component, pattern, or owner changed
- [ ] `src/design-system/README.md` updated if DS inventory or ownership changed
- [ ] `design-system.md` updated if handoff guidance, token naming, or mapping rules changed
- [ ] `krukraft-ai-contexts/06-design-system.md` updated if shared DS/Figma understanding changed
- [ ] live Figma file was updated when the shared visual contract changed
